hero.title: Welcome to Dalyan
hero.subtitle: Turkey's Hidden Paradise
hero.description: Where ancient history meets untouched nature — discover Lycian rock tombs, cruise the reed-lined delta, walk pristine Turtle Beach, and bathe in thermal springs that have healed travellers for millennia.

highlights.title: A Living Open-Air Museum
highlights.subtitle: Where 3,000 years of history meets untouched Mediterranean nature

history.title: 3,000 Years of History
history.text: From the mighty Kaunos Ancient City to the iconic Lycian Rock Tombs carved into sheer cliff faces — Dalyan is a living timeline of Carian, Greek, Roman, and Byzantine civilizations.

nature.title: Pristine Nature
nature.text: Iztuzu Beach, one of the last remaining Caretta Caretta nesting grounds in the Mediterranean, stretches 12 km without a single building. The Dalyan Delta shelters over 180 bird species.

wellness.title: Ancient Healing Waters
wellness.text: Sultaniye Hot Springs have been healing visitors for 2,000 years. Natural mineral-rich mud baths offer a rejuvenation experience unchanged since antiquity.

cuisine.title: Authentic Mediterranean Flavours
cuisine.text: Fresh sea bass from the river, wild herbs from the mountains, legendary blue crab from Köyceğiz Lake — Dalyan's cuisine is a celebration of land and sea.

hubs.title: Discover Every Corner of Dalyan
hubs.subtitle: Six curated journeys through history, nature, wellness, adventure, cuisine, and local knowledge

kaunos.title: Kaunos Ancient City
kaunos.text: Walk through the remains of a 3,000-year-old city — from its 5,000-seat Roman theatre to the harbour that once connected Kaunos to the ancient world.

rockTombs.title: Lycian Rock Tombs
rockTombs.text: Carved into sheer cliff faces in the 4th century BC, these temple-style tombs glow golden at sunset and are illuminated at night — Dalyan's most iconic sight.

iztuzu.title: Iztuzu Turtle Beach
iztuzu.text: A 12-kilometre golden sand strip with zero buildings, protected since 1988 as one of the Mediterranean's most important Caretta Caretta nesting grounds.

stats.title: Dalyan in Numbers
stats.subtitle: A rare corner of Turkey where ancient civilisation blends seamlessly with protected nature

experience.title: One Day, Infinite Memories
experience.subtitle: A typical day in Dalyan — morning to sunset

morning.title: Riverside Breakfast
morning.text: Start your day with a traditional Turkish breakfast overlooking the Rock Tombs — fresh cheese, honey, olives, and endless tea.

midMorning.title: River Boat Cruise
midMorning.text: Board a traditional wooden boat and glide through the reed-lined delta towards the ancient city of Kaunos.

noon.title: Mud Bath & Hot Springs
noon.text: Cover yourself in mineral-rich mud, dry in the sun, and rinse off in 39°C thermal waters — a 2,000-year-old wellness ritual.

afternoon.title: Iztuzu Beach
afternoon.text: Arrive at Turkey's most famous turtle beach — 12 km of pristine sand where Caretta Caretta turtles nest each summer.

evening.title: Golden Hour Sunset
evening.text: Watch the Rock Tombs glow amber, then golden, then deep orange as the sun sets behind the mountains. Pure magic.

night.title: Riverside Dinner
night.text: Fresh fish, local meze, and Turkish wine under the stars — with the illuminated tombs reflected in the still river water.

1.quote: We took the river boat past the rock tombs at sunset and it was genuinely breathtaking. Dalyan feels like a secret the rest of the world hasn't found yet.
1.name: Sarah M.

2.quote: The combination of ancient ruins, thermal springs and unspoiled beaches is unlike anything else in the Mediterranean. We keep coming back every summer.
2.name: Hans W.

3.quote: Watching a Caretta Caretta turtle swim alongside our boat was a once-in-a-lifetime moment. Dalyan is a paradise for nature lovers and families alike.
3.name: Marie L.

cta.title: Ready to Discover Dalyan?
cta.subtitle: Just 25 km from Dalaman International Airport — your Mediterranean paradise awaits.

map.title: Find Every Attraction
map.subtitle: Click any marker to explore — each links directly to its dedicated page with full details.

weather.title: Dalyan Weather Guide
weather.subtitle: Plan your perfect visit with monthly weather data, sea temperatures, and activity recommendations
